title: Iran threatens to close Hormuz again if US blockade continues - IRGC outlet
snippet: IRGC-affiliated Fars News citing SNSC source: Iran considers US naval blockade a ceasefire violation. Will close Strait of Hormuz again if blockade not lifted. IRGC Navy: any military vessel approaching the strait meets 'severe response'.
tag_reason: 아라그치의 개방 선언과 동시에 IRGC 측에서 재폐쇄 위협 — 이란 내부 강경파/실용파 갈등의 신규 징후
